notes: Fullscreen does not work and before manually setting resolution, menu does not fully fit to its window. Otherwise everything seems to be running OK and game runs at more or less solid 50+ fps / 1080p with nouveau / Quadro K2100M when antialiasing and motion blur are disabled.
title: Castlevania: Lords of Shadow – Mirror of Fate HD

notes: Fullscreen does not work and before manually setting resolution, menu/game does not fully fit to its window. Otherwise everything seems to be running OK. Performance wise it's 25-35fps at 1080p with this hardware, when antialiasing and motion blur are disabled. Tested in tutorial. Most likely very playable at 720p but didn't bother to test.
title: Castlevania: Lords of Shadow – Mirror of Fate HD
